.github/workflows/build.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use Java 21 instead of Java 17 for the build environment.

.github/workflows/dockerize.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use Java 21 instead of Java 17 for the build environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/web/Authe.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/web/Authe.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial, the code may fail to compile or trigger warnings/errors depending on the compiler configuration (e.g., --enable-preview or specific linting rules enabled in the migration recipe).

src/main/java/com/example/demo/web/RestE.general_idea: Migrate instanceof check with explicit cast to pattern matching syntax introduced in Java 16.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/web/RestE.before:
if (ex instanceof WebExchangeBindException) {
            var webExchangeBindException = (WebExchangeBindException) ex;
